overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a densely packed futuristic urban center. The player navigates wet neon-lit streets, crosses intersections with moderate vehicle traffic, and passes towering buildings covered in holographic advertisements and Japanese-inspired signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian underpass with concrete infrastructure

events.description: exits covered concrete underpass into open neon-lit city street

agents.ego_description: walking out from under the concrete overpass structure into the open street

notable_agents.action: walking ahead on the sidewalk toward the street exit

entered.detail: massive concrete bridge overhead with thick support pillars
building facade illuminated with red and white neon signage

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a dark concrete overpass with limited visibility of the sky. The player walks forward through the sheltered space, passing neon accents on the walls, and emerges into the open neon-lit city street around the 4-second mark.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane intersection with yellow striped crosswalks

events.description: crossing the wide street at the yellow striped pedestrian crosswalk
turning left to follow the sidewalk along the main street

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection and turning left to proceed along the sidewalk

notable_agents.action: futuristic silver sedan driving through the intersection

entered.detail: broad pedestrian crossing marked with bold diagonal yellow stripes
skyscraper covered in vertical neon advertisements and holographic displays
tall vertical neon sign reading HOTEL in bright pink letters

segments.scene_description: The player emerges into a wide open intersection surrounded by towering neon-lit buildings. After crossing the yellow-striped crosswalk around 13 seconds, they turn left and proceed along the sidewalk, with a prominent pink HOTEL sign visible on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial street with dense digital advertising

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past illuminated storefronts and towering digital billboards

notable_agents.action: walking ahead on the sidewalk wearing dark clothing

entered.detail: massive curved screen displaying animated food advertisements
metal barrier separating the sidewalk from the street traffic

segments.scene_description: The player proceeds down a long stretch of sidewalk lined with metal railings on the left and massive digital billboards on the right. The street is moderately busy with sparse pedestrian traffic and occasional vehicles passing by on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection with DTR corporate signage and weapon shops

events.description: waiting at the intersection for vehicles to pass before crossing
crossing the busy intersection as multiple vehicles drive through

agents.ego_description: navigating across the busy intersection while watching for passing cars

notable_agents.action: blue sports car speeding through the intersection
red sedan crossing the intersection from right to left

entered.detail: large green neon corporate sign reading DTR with logo
red neon signage for weapon store reading BIG PISTOLS
bright yellow neon sign with Japanese characters

segments.scene_description: The player approaches a major intersection dominated by the large green DTR neon sign overhead. After waiting for traffic around 38 seconds, they cross the busy intersection as various futuristic vehicles pass by, including a blue sports car and red sedan.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with pink foliage trees and storefronts

events.description: passing distinctive pink-leaved cherry blossom trees lining the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk past shops and decorative pink trees

notable_agents.action: person in colorful outfit standing near a shop entrance

entered.detail: decorative tree with bright pink cherry-blossom-like foliage
storefront entrance with green neon lighting and glass doors

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the player walking along a quieter sidewalk section featuring distinctive pink-leaved trees on the left and illuminated shop fronts on the right. The DTR sign and major intersection fade from view as the player continues deeper into the neon-lit district.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the claustrophobic shadows of an urban underpass into the sprawling, neon-drenched heart of a futuristic city. It begins beneath a dark concrete overpass with limited visibility, moving past neon wall accents before emerging into the open air of a wide intersection surrounded by towering skyscrapers. As the camera crosses a yellow-striped crosswalk and turns left, the environment shifts toward a dense commercial corridor lined with metal railings, a prominent pink hotel sign, and massive digital billboards. The scene then opens up at a major intersection dominated by a large green DTR neon sign, where the camera pauses before weaving through a stream of futuristic vehicles, including a blue sports car and a red sedan. Finally, the movement carries the viewer away from the traffic and into a quieter district characterized by illuminated shop fronts and distinctive pink-leaved trees.
